text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The girls in my class were talking about this place
that serves desserts and stuff.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They suddenly decided to go all together, which
got everyone excited.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They were going around and asking everyone
what their schedules were like... So I left.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't really like sweets, so... I'd probably just
ruin the mood, you know?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Why does everyone in my class have to be so friendly?
